Zinc..Back: Aching in the dorsal, lumbar, and sacral regions; better when walking and worse from rising from a seat.
Zinc..Back, pain: Aching in the dorsal, lumbar, and sacral regions; better when walking and worse from rising from a seat.
Zinc..Bladder: Difficult expulsion of urine; paralysis of the bladder and tedious constipation associated with spinal symptoms; urine slow in starting; can pass it only when sitting and in some cases only when sitting leaning back against the seat with hard pressure.
Zinc..Chest: Constriction of the whole chest in weakly subjects.
Zinc..Chill: Always chilly; sensitive to the cold.
Zinc..Extremities: The great nervousness of Zinc. is manifested in the feet. You will notice a child or a woman keeping one foot going all the time, cannot keep it still.
Zinc..Generalities: The whole economy seems to be tired and feeble, so that when a girl approaches puberty and it is time for the menses to be established, but the flow does not appear, she goes into a decline.
Zinc..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: burning of the whole spine, creeping and crawling of the extremities
Zinc..Genitalia female: no matter what the violent symptoms are pains in the ovaries, in the uterus, hysterical excitement; as soon as the menstrual flow appears there is relief.
Zinc..Genitalia female, pain: Violent pains in the ovaries relieved by the flow.
Zinc..Head: rolling of the head for days; eyes lusterless; body emaciated, involuntary discharges of faeces and urine in the bed
Zinc..Mind: Feeble children, feeble girls, mind feeble, memory poor.
Zinc..Mind, irritability: Tendency to be docile, but when aroused irascible.
Zinc..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: The Zinc. patient is nervous and extremely sensitive, excitable, trembling, quivering, twitching of muscles, tearing pains along the course of the nerves, tingling, excited on the least provocation.
Zinc..Rectum, constipation: The intestines are sluggish. The rectum becomes impacted. Difficult expulsion of urine; paralysis of the bladder and tedious constipation associated with spinal symptoms.
Zinc..Respiration: Constriction of the whole chest in weakly subjects.
Zinc..Respiration, difficult: Constriction of the whole chest in weakly subjects.
Zinc..Skin: the skin looks withered; the face pallid, wrinkled, unhealthy, sickly.
Zinc..Stomach: The stomach is slow in digesting; sour vomiting.
Zinc..Back, weakness: paralytic weakness, emaciation, prostration; full of brain and spinal symptoms.
Zinc..Bladder, urination: urine slow in starting; can pass it only when sitting and in some cases only when sitting leaning back against the seat with hard pressure.
Zinc..Generalities, pain: Full of neuralgic pains; tearing pains in all parts of the body when exposed to a draft; tension and drawing in various places.
Zinc..Generalities, pain, burning: burning of the whole spine, creeping and crawling of the extremities
Zinc..Clinical, paralysis: Limbs paralyzed; paresis and finally paralysis of one or both sides jerking, trembling and prostration.
Zinc..Head, congestion: The early stage will be that of congestion, and Bell. may palliate, but with the onset of the symptoms enumerated above, Zinc. is the only remedy that will cure.
Zinc..Mind, restlessness: Sensitive to every little noise, to people talking in the room, to crumpling of paper. Talking or listening is distressing; much talking of other people, even of those of who he is fond, affects his nerves and makes him morose.
Zinc..Clinical: After scarlet fever and badly treated meningitis; tubercular meningitis. I have carried these severe forms of brain disease through on Phosphorus, which has a picture somewhat like that of Zincum.
